1.title: King City Command
1.body: Real-time rally coordination for Whiteout Survival King City events. No install — open the link and go.

2.title: Enter the 8-digit PIN
2.body: Type the PIN your commander shared. Everyone using the same PIN joins the same operation room.

3.title: No room yet? Generate one
3.body: The first to enter becomes commander. Others use the same PIN to join. Don't forget to share the link.

4.title: Click here to enter
4.body: Next you'll set your callsign and pick Driver / Passenger. Driver = leads own rally; Passenger = joins someone else's.

1.title: You're the commander
1.body: First in this PIN, so you're auto-assigned commander. You set target time, lock the op, kick people, transfer command.

2.title: Set arrival time
2.body: Type the rally arrival time. HH:MM:SS — each field independent, you can edit just minutes if needed.

3.title: Don't want to math? Use shortcuts
3.body: +5m = arrive in 5 minutes. +6m keeps current seconds (counter-rally). ±10s / ±1s for fine-tuning.

4.title: Whole-room countdown
4.body: Everyone sees this countdown. Setting target time syncs to all drivers instantly.

5.title: Add proxy drivers
5.body: For guildmates not using this tool — you can add a placeholder driver with their march time pre-set.

6.title: Coordinator vs participant
6.body: Uncheck 'I'm rallying too' to coordinate without joining the rally — you won't appear in the driver list.

7.title: Lock when ready to fire
7.body: Locking freezes all settings and auto-snapshots a battle log. Only press when you're committing to launch.

8.title: Settings live here
8.body: Sound, language, theme, timezone, leave room — all in the gear menu.

1.title: This is your car
1.body: Your row is always first with a blue ring. Others sort by march time, longest first.

2.title: Watch this number
2.body: After commander sets time, this counts down. <10s turns red and pulses. At 0, press 'Start Rally' in-game immediately.

3.title: Set your march first
3.body: Seconds to march from your city to the target. Use ± to adjust or type directly.

4.title: Rally window
4.body: The rally duration you select in-game. Default 5min — some commanders use 10min.

5.title: Vanguard tank?
5.body: Set -2s to land 2 seconds early (shield-tank tactic). Most drivers leave this at 0.

6.title: Make sure sound is on
6.body: Beeps fire at countdown. If you can't hear them, check the gear menu for mute toggle.

1.title: Row ⋯ menu
1.body: Tap ⋯ on any driver row to rename, switch role, mark counter-rally, transfer command, or kick.

2.title: Battle history
2.body: Every locked op auto-saves a snapshot. Open this anytime to see who was online and exact landing times.

3.title: Multi-timezone
3.body: Pick your timezone here. Each user can pick differently — Firebase stores UTC, displays per-user. Countdowns stay aligned.

brand.title: KING CITY COMMAND
brand.subtitle: REAL-TIME RALLY COORDINATION
brand.desc: Enter the 8-digit PIN to join a command room. All drivers and the commander must use the same PIN.

entry.hint: Share the PIN with your drivers via Discord / LINE after creating a room.

room.my_launch_hint: Press "Start Rally" in-game when this hits zero
room.coordinator_desc: You're only coordinating — not in driver list
room.locked_banner: 🔒 RALLY LOCKED — commander must unlock to edit
room.copy_failed: Copy failed, please copy URL manually
room.waiting_target: Waiting for commander to set arrival time…
room.counter_rally_active_self: You are marked counter-rally — alerts will fire as usual
room.counter_rally_passive_self: You are not in the counter-rally — sit this op out, no alerts will fire
room.set_counter_rally: Mark as counter-rally (only those outside King City)
room.confirm_claim: The commander appears to be offline. Take over command?
room.add_driver_hint: Add a driver on behalf of someone who isn't using the tool
room.add_driver_err_name_too_long: Name must be 20 characters or fewer
room.auto_cleaned: Auto-removed {{count}} drivers offline for more than 5 hours
room.battle_history_desc: Locked-in operation snapshots. Click an entry to expand drivers.
room.confirm_delete_battle: Delete this battle log? This cannot be undone.
room.kicked: You have been removed from the room by the commander
room.confirm_leave_as_commander: You are the commander. After leaving, the room will be temporarily without one (others can claim, or you can transfer command before leaving). Leave anyway?

error.system_error_hint: Something went wrong · please reload the page
